examples: You do have an oven you know. we can reheat.
When you reheat it, you may need to add some water.
Reheat days, hot heart; have faith, everything is possible.
After World War II, gas ovens made it easier to reheat pizzas without burning them.
When I turned on the microwave to reheat some edamame with dinner, I was greeted by a loud jolt, and plunged into darkness.
